art_market.summary: Art Basel Hong Kong 2026 (Mar 27-29) continues. Strong sales noted for Picasso (€3.5M) and Liu Ye ($3.8M).
top_stories: Robust sales reported; high-value works by Picasso and Liu Ye sold.
Collaboration agreement signed with HK government for 5 years.
Growing focus on Asian artists and platforms like 'Echoes' and 'Zero 10'.

stock_market.summary: US markets showing slight recovery as US futures rise 0.31% following Trump's extension of Iran energy talks. S&P 500 at 6497.
key_factors: US stock futures rose 0.31% following Trump's Iran energy deadline extension.
Previous session saw a 1.74% drop amid geopolitical and oil price concerns.
Recession fears continue as major institutions adjust forecasts.
